zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Coggeshall ,Knight於1358年7月20日出生在英國艾可時，他的父親Henry de Coggeshall28歲，母親Lady Joane de Welles21歲。他於1379年3月之前與Antiocha Hawkwood結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。他於1401年在英國艾可被列為justice of the peace。他去世於1426年在英國艾可維瑟斯費爾德享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Coggeshall ,Knight于1358年7月20日出生在英国艾可时，他的父亲Henry de Coggeshall28岁，母亲Lady Joane de Welles21岁。他于1379年3月之前与Antiocha Hawkwood结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。他于1401年在英国艾可被列为justice of the peace。他去世于1426年在英国艾可維瑟斯費爾德享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Coggeshall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Middlesex): habitational name from Coggeshall in Essex, named from an Old English personal name Cogg + halh ‘nook’.

History: This name was taken to America in 1632 by John Coggeshall, who became first governor of RI, and in 1635 by John Cogswell. In 1887 a descendant, Daniel Cogswell, founded Cogswell College, San Francisco.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Coggeshall ,Knight was born on 20 July 1358, in Essex, England, his father, Henry de Coggeshall, was 28 and his mother, Lady Joane de Welles, was 21. He married Antiocha Hawkwood before March 1379. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. In 1401, at the age of 43, his occupation is listed as justice of the peace in Essex, England. He died in 1426, in Wethersfield, Essex, England, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Coggeshall ,Knight est né le 20 juillet 1358, à Essex, Angleterre, son père, Henry de Coggeshall, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Lady Joane de Welles, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Antiocha Hawkwood avant mars 1379. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. En 1401, à l’âge de 43 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est justice of the peace à Essex, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1426, à Wethersfield, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Coggeshall ,Knight am 20. Juli 1358 in Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry de Coggeshall 28 und seine Mutter Lady Joane de Welles 21. Er hat vor März 1379 Antiocha Hawkwood geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. 1401, als er 43 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als justice of the peace in Essex, England aufgeführt. Er starb 1426 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Wethersfield, Essex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Coggeshall ,Knight è nato il il 20 luglio 1358 nel Essex, England, il suo padre, Henry de Coggeshall, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Lady Joane de Welles, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Antiocha Hawkwood prima del marzo 1379. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Nel 1401, all'età di 43 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come justice of the peace nel Essex, England. Morì nel 1426, nel Wethersfield, Essex, England, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Coggeshall ,Knightが1358年7月20日にイギリスエセックスで生まれた時，父Henry de Coggeshallは28歳，母Lady Joane de Wellesは21歳であった。1379年3月以前にAntiocha Hawkwoodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。1401年，43歳の時，イギリスエセックスでの職業はjustice of the peaceと記録されている。彼は1426年にイギリスエセックスウエスエルスフィールドで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Coggeshall ,Knight(이)가 1358년 7월 20일 영국 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de Coggeshall(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Joane de Welles(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1379년 3월 이전 Antiocha Hawkwood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1401년, 43세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 에세스에서 justice of the peace이었다. 그는 1426년 영국 에세스 w더스필드에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Coggeshall, Essex, England: Coggeshall, Ēastseaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Coggeshall ,Knight nasceu em 20 de julho de 1358, em Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry de Coggeshall, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joane de Welles, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Antiocha Hawkwood antes março de 1379. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Em 1401, com 43 anos, sua profissão aparece como justice of the peace em Essex, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1426, em Wethersfield, Essex, Inglaterra, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Coggeshall ,Knight родился 20 июля 1358 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry de Coggeshall было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joane de Welles, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Antiocha Hawkwood перед марта 1379 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. В 1401 году, в возрасте 43 лет,  он работал по профессии justice of the peace в местности эссекс, Англия. Он умер в 1426 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Coggeshall ,Knight nació el 20 de julio de 1358, en Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry de Coggeshall, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Lady Joane de Welles, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Antiocha Hawkwood antes de marzo de 1379. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. En 1401, a la edad de 43 años, su ocupación registrada era justice of the peace en Essex, Inglaterra. Murió en 1426, en Wethersfield, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años.
